case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. DEANNA TAM

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-27-2016 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
